title: Algarve Blue Coupe Bowl 20cm - Pack of 6
features: Set of 6 x Algarve Blue Coupe Bowl 20cm
Made from Earthenware which is dishwasher and microwave safe

Queens by Churchill is made by Churchill that has history which dates back to 1795 in the heart of the world-famous potteries, Stoke-On-Trent. Over 220 years of British manufacturing, Churchill provides ceramics to hospitality and retail markets
The Algarve evokes memories of fond summer vacations, where intricate traditional tiles sheathed buildings on the backdrop of rugged coastlines and crystal seas.
description: Queen's is a retail brand by Churchill China (UK) Ltd. We can trace our history back to 1795 in the heart of the world famous potteries, Stoke-on-Trent. Since then, we have developed a long history of providing ceramics to hospitality and retail markets. Offering exciting brands has been key to Churchill's success, and it is proud of the relationships that have been developed and the exciting opportunities that they bring. Churchill has a number of own UK brands under the Queens' retail division such as: Country Pursuits - with our quirky countryside characters, Paradise Birds - with the well loved Puffin and Penguin mugs, and our beautiful UK dinnerware which includes our famous legacy pattern Blue Willow. Celebrating contemporary and traditional design, Queen's has something for everyone.
